hero.tagline: Your partner for all types of work
hero.title: Ship Repair
hero.subtitle: Comprehensive repair and maintenance for all types of sea and river vessels. We also provide maintenance and service for sailing yachts, motor yachts, and outboard engines.
hero.location: Located on the Danube · Serving all of Europe · 24/7 Rapid Response

vesselsRepair.title: Repair of all types of vessels
vesselsRepair.yachtLine: We also service sailing yachts, motor yachts, and outboard engines.
vesselsRepair.paragraph1: Our ship repair team carries out major and scheduled repairs of all types of sea and river vessels, performing ship repair work of any complexity.
vesselsRepair.paragraph2: Our location directly on the Danube is ideal for the scheduled maintenance and repair of all types of vessels. Thanks to our versatility and flexibility, repairs or modifications to technical systems can be carried out quickly and easily, even within short timeframes.
vesselsRepair.bullet1: Major & scheduled repairs for sea and river vessels
vesselsRepair.bullet3: Quick turnaround even in short timeframes
vesselsRepair.bullet4: Repairs and modifications of any complexity

comprehensiveRepair.title: Comprehensive repair
comprehensiveRepair.paragraph1: Regular inspections and monitoring of technical systems are essential for the efficient and hassle-free operation of the vessel.
comprehensiveRepair.paragraph2: We have the necessary specialists to reliably carry out ship repair work, ensuring that the operation is as safe and dependable as possible.

common.applyByEmail: You can also apply by e-mail

services.label: What We Do
services.title: Our Services
services.shipRepairDesc: Major and scheduled repairs of all types of sea and river vessels. Hull, engine, electrical systems and more.
services.sailingYachtsDesc: Mast, rigging & hull repair. Electrical & navigation systems. Winterization and commissioning.
services.motorYachtsDesc: Inboard engine repair & overhaul. Drive shaft & propeller repair. Hydraulic system maintenance.
services.outboardDesc: Full engine diagnostics. Carburetor & fuel system. Cooling system flush. Gear housing repair.

advantages.label: Our Advantages
advantages.title: Why Do Clients Trust Us?
advantages.subtitle: Individual approach, highly qualified specialists, and the ability to perform emergency repairs throughout Europe.
advantages.item1Desc: Solving complex challenges in ship repair and marine engineering; we also offer yacht and boat service.
advantages.item2Desc: We perform all necessary calculations and offer the optimal solution for every task.
advantages.item3Desc: Customer loyalty program, honest pricing, and verified client reviews.
advantages.item4Desc: Mobile rapid response team available around the clock across Europe.

howWeWork.label: Process
howWeWork.title: How We Operate
howWeWork.step1Desc: You submit a request for an estimate and provide your contact details for a meeting with the manager.
howWeWork.step2Desc: Within 24 hours, we will prepare the work estimate and send it to you for approval.
howWeWork.step3Desc: At the agreed time, our team arrives and begins to carry out the planned repair work.
howWeWork.step4Desc: You accept the work completed by our team and make the final agreed payment.

shipRepair.label: Services
shipRepair.title: Ship Repair
shipRepair.intro: We repair damage resulting from accidents, failures and defects of electrical systems and engines, renew insulation and corrosion protection, and much more. Our ship repair team carries out major and scheduled repairs of all types of sea and river vessels.
shipRepair.yachtLine: Yacht and boat maintenance and repair are available on request.
shipRepair.item1: Replacement of hull components, propeller-rudder systems, deck mechanisms
shipRepair.item2: Maintenance and repair of boilers, pumps, engines, and ship pipelines
shipRepair.item3: Repair of main and auxiliary diesel engines
shipRepair.item4: Repair of all types of pumps and auxiliary mechanisms
shipRepair.item5: Repair of winches, windlasses, and other mechanisms
shipRepair.item6: Repair of main marine engines and diesel generator engines
shipRepair.item8: Repair and maintenance of electric machines and generators
shipRepair.item9: Repair of automation and control systems

yachtService.label: Services
yachtService.title: Yacht & Boat Service
yachtService.subtitle: In addition to ship repair, we provide a full range of maintenance and service for sailing yachts, motor yachts, and outboard engines — anywhere in Europe.

partners.label: Partners
partners.title: We Are Official Representatives
partners.subtitle: We proudly partner with leading companies in the marine industry to bring you the best products and services.

asm.name: All Services Marine (A-S-M)
asm.description: Service centre for boat maintenance, repair and refurbishment. Specializing in sailing yachts, motor yachts, outboard engines and more.

permateak.name: PermaTEAK
permateak.description: High-quality artificial teak floor covering. Ecologically friendly, superior aesthetic appearance without the problems of classic teak decks.

coelmo.name: COELMO
coelmo.description: Industrial and Marine Generating Sets from 3 to 4000 kVA since 1946. International after sale service, anytime anywhere.

gydc.name: Global Yacht Delivery Captains
gydc.description: Experienced professionals delivering yachts of all sizes worldwide, with pre-delivery inspections and logistics management.

croatiaBroker.name: Croatia Broker
croatiaBroker.description: Specialized yacht brokerage agency in Croatia, focused on the sale and purchase of motorboats, sailing yachts and other vessels.

yachtRent.name: Yacht-Rent
yachtRent.description: Yacht charter agency with an interactive map for planning cruise routes across the Croatian coast.

footer.description: Comprehensive repair and maintenance for all types of vessels. We also service yachts and boats.
footer.copyright: ARD Service — Afloat Repair Division. All rights reserved.

vacancies.title: Vacancies
vacancies.intro: Join ARD Service. We are looking for qualified specialists in ship repair and maintenance.
